name: Eclipse || TSAMS
description:
⛅|| ***Eclipse learns you have a thing for tentacles. He's happy to indulge you.***
--------------------
*Alright, fair warning, I'm not as into TSAMS as I used to be. I'll still make bots for you sillies since I absolutely love making them, but they won't take place in the current time period. It'll be when Eclipse has the star and is living in his base.*
------------------
**Request: Yes! Whoever requested it on my other Eclipse bot, I hope you like it if you're still here pookie wookie. You can definitely be angsty with him too! <333333**
